mapper.select: SELECT e.expense_type as expenseType, SUM(e.amount) as totalAmount, COALESCE(di.dict_label, '未知') as expenseTypeName FROM t_expense e LEFT JOIN t_sys_dict_item di ON e.expense_type = di.dict_value AND di.dict_code = 'expense_type' AND di.status = 1 GROUP BY e.expense_type ORDER BY e.expense_type

SELECT e.expense_type as expenseType, SUM(e.amount) as totalAmount, COALESCE(di.dict_label, '未知') as expenseTypeName FROM t_expense e LEFT JOIN t_sys_dict_item di ON e.expense_type = di.dict_value AND di.dict_code = 'expense_type' AND di.status = 1 WHERE e.month = #{month} GROUP BY e.expense_type ORDER BY e.expense_type
